---
# Tags, badges, and status indicators

---

## Tags

### When to use

To categorize or label items with metadata values such as topics, types, or user-defined attributes.

### Style

- Use sentence case.
- Keep tag text to one to three words.
- Do not use tags as action triggers - they are labels, not buttons.

---

## Badges

### When to use

To indicate a count (for example, unread notifications) or a status qualifier on an item.

### Style

- Badge labels are single words or short abbreviations.
- Use standard status vocabulary: New, Updated, Draft, Published, Deprecated.
